description: Source code for personaService.js, a service module that interacts with AWS Bedrock for persona draft generation, validation, persistence, and finalization. It includes functions for schema validation, JSON parsing, and AWS SDK interactions.

methods.name: _extractTextFromBedrockResponseJson
methods.description: Extracts text content from AWS Bedrock response JSON, handling different response formats.

methods.name: _stripMarkdownCodeFences
methods.description: Removes markdown code fences from text, especially JSON fences.

methods.name: _extractFirstJsonSubstring
methods.description: Attempts to extract the first JSON object substring from prose that contains JSON.

methods.name: _safeJsonParse
methods.description: Safely parses JSON, with fallback to extracting JSON substring if necessary.

methods.name: _normalizeCareerHighlights
methods.description: Normalizes career_highlights array to conform to schema, handling string and object entries.

methods.name: _assertValidPersonaDraft
methods.description: Validates and normalizes persona draft JSON against schema, throws error if invalid.

methods.name: _buildClaudeConverseInput
methods.description: Builds the payload for AWS Bedrock Converse API, segmenting resume, job description, and review sections.

methods.name: _getBedrockClient
methods.description: Creates and returns an AWS Bedrock Runtime client, requiring AWS_REGION env variable.

methods.name: generatePersonaDraft
methods.description: Generates a persona draft using AWS Bedrock Claude, with schema validation and fallback to mock.

methods.name: createPersonaDraft
methods.description: Persists a persona draft JSON into the database, supporting legacy and current schemas.

methods.name: finalizePersona
methods.description: Copies a persona draft from persona_drafts to persona_final table, generating a new ID.
